code:
import io
import string

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut at_start = true
  mut need_space = false
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9
        at_start = true
        if not string.is_empty(result)
          need_space = true
        end
      else
        if need_space
          result = "#{result} "
          need_space = false
        end
        let out_b = if at_start and b >= 97 and b <= 122
          b - 32
        else
          b
        end
        result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(out_b)}"
        at_start = false
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(result)
when None
  ()
end
